Package i5.cb.graph

Class GraphMenuItem

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.AbstractButton
            • javax.swing.JMenuItem
              • i5.cb.graph.GraphMenuItem
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ILangChangeable

    public class GraphMenuItem
extends javax.swing.JMenuItem
implements ILangChangeable
    The main purpose of this extension of JMenuItem is the implementation of the ILangChangeable interface. To create an instance of this class, you have to specify the name of a ResourceBundle and a keyWord that is handled in this Bundle.
    Since:
    1.0
    See Also:
    JMenuItem, ILangChangeable, ResourceBundle, Serialized Form

    • Constructor Detail

      • GraphMenuItem

        public GraphMenuItem​(java.lang.String keyWord,
                     java.lang.String bundleName,
                     GraphEditor ge,
                     int actionID,
                     boolean enabled)
        Creates a JMenuItem. Gets the basic resource textBundle and labeles the MenuItem with the String, that is specified by the keyWord. Then it adds an GECommand specified by the GraphEditor and the actionId.
        Parameters:
        keyWord - make sure, that this String is a valid keyWord of the given resourceBundle.
        bundleName - name of the resourceBundle baseclass
        ge - the GraphEditor
        actionID - the ID to create the suitable ActionListener
        See Also:
        GECommand

      • GraphMenuItem

        public GraphMenuItem​(java.lang.String keyWord,
                     java.lang.String bundleName,
                     int mnemonic,
                     GraphEditor ge,
                     int actionID,
                     boolean enabled)
        Creates a JMenuItem that reacts on the given mnemonic key. Gets the basic resource textBundle and labeles the MenuItem with the String, that is specified by the keyWord. Then it adds an GECommand specified by the GraphEditor and the actionId.
        Parameters:
        keyWord - make sure, that this String is a valid keyWord of the given resourceBundle.
        bundleName - name of the resourceBundle baseclass
        mnemonic - the menu listens to this keyInput
        ge - the GraphEditor
        actionID - the ID to create the suitable ActionListener
        See Also:
        GECommand

      • GraphMenuItem

        public GraphMenuItem​(java.lang.String keyWord,
                     java.lang.String bundleName,
                     int mnemonic,
                     boolean enabled)
        Creates a JMenuItem that reacts on the given mnemonic key. Gets the basic resource textBundle and labeles the MenuItem with the String, that is specified by the keyWord.
        Parameters:
        keyWord - make sure, that this String is a valid keyWord of the given resourceBundle.
        bundleName - name of the resourceBundle baseclass
        mnemonic - the menu listens to this keyInput

      • GraphMenuItem

        public GraphMenuItem​(java.lang.String keyWord,
                     java.lang.String bundleName,

        Creates a JMenuItem. Gets the basic resource textBundle and labeles the MenuItem with the String, that is specified by the keyWord.

        keyWord - make sure, that this String is a valid keyWord of the given resourceBundle.
        bundleName - name of the resourceBundle baseclass

    • Method Detail

      • updateLang

        public javax.swing.text.DefaultStyledDocument updateLang​(java.util.Locale loc)
        Updates the textField with the current language. Requires, that this GraphMenuItem's keyWord is defined in the current textBundle.
        Specified by:
        updateLang in interface ILangChangeable
        Parameters:
        loc - the actual language's textBundle
        Returns:
        always null at the moment
